Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL01_DISCOVERE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5073 0 0}There's a Shadow directly ahead of you! Though it doesn't seem to have noticed you yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL01_DISCOVERE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Aigis, since you're equipped with firearms, I bet you could shoot them from afar.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}If there's enough distance between you and the Shadow, then I don't think they'll notice you. How about giving it a try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL02_DISCOVERE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20508 0 0}Another Shadow up ahead. Let's get you more accustomed to combat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20509 0 0}The battle's about to begin! Everyone, stay focused![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERED_TBOX_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20517 0 0}The heck? Hey, I found some kinda boxy-lookin' thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERED_TBOX_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20518 0 0}Yes, boxes like those seem to be scattered all throughout Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20519 0 0}Sometimes they contain useful items for battle. Seek them out as often as you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERED_TBOX_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20520 0 0}Oh sweet, so they're basically like treasure chests![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20521 0 0}Hell yeah! Let's bust it open and see what's inside![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NOT_GET_TBOX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20522 0 0}Hey, c'mon! Aren't you dyin' to know what's inside!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL03_DISCOVERE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20525 0 0}Looks like they haven't noticed you yet. Now's your chance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20526 0 0}Try sneaking up on them from behind! Make sure you stay out of their field of vision.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL03_RUN_AWAY_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20528 0 0}The enemy will notice you if you get too close. Try pulling back and shooting from afar.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL04_DISCOVERE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20536 0 0}I detect another Shadow up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20537 0 0}Take advantage of what you just learned. Try not to alert the enemy as you move.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL04_RUN_AWAY_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4561 0 0}The goal today is to gain experience in battle! Running away is not an option.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL04_RUN_AWAY_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20540 0 0}I hope you're not tired yet because it's time to step it up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20541 0 0}Now approach the enemy from behind, carefully.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERED_STAIRS_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20549 0 0}Wait! We're looking for the teleporter, aren't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERED_STAIRS_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20550 0 0}Exactly what Takeba said. Please prioritize getting back safely for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NOT_GET_MEDAL_TBOX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20557 0 0}Wait, don't waste this chance. Try opening that box.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MEDAL_INFO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4567 0 0}That reaction... Do you have a {f 0 1 39}Twilight Fragment{f 0 1 27} with you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Try holding it up to the treasure chest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERED_RETDEV_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20558 0 0}Looks like you found a teleporter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERED_RETDEV_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20559 0 0}Now use it to return to the entrance.[n]{f 1 1}
